services.description: A list of services I offer, including web development, consulting, and technical support.

ainera.description: Focused on the end-to-end development and optimization of web applications tailored to specific client business requirements.
highlights: Developed responsive and user-centric web interfaces using modern frontend technologies to ensure a seamless user experience.
Collaborated directly with clients to translate business needs into technical specifications and functional web features.
Optimized existing web platforms for better performance, accessibility, and SEO rankings.

timitis.description: Contributed to the full-cycle development of an IT service order management platform, bridging the gap between client requests and service delivery.
highlights: Engineered a robust Full-Stack architecture utilizing React with TypeScript for the frontend and Spring Boot (Java) for the backend.
Designed and implemented secure RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless CRUD operations and data flow between the client and server.
Architected relational database models to ensure data integrity and efficient querying for high-volume service requests.
Operated within an Agile environment, utilizing Git for version control and participating in sprint planning and daily stand-ups.

lutra-ledger.description: An application made for UAB Lutra that generates PDF documents based on selected services and user information.
content: # Overview
Lutra Ledger is a desktop application built for UAB Lutra. It takes chosen service details and user information and automatically generates clean, structured PDF documents.
## Features
- Select from a predefined list of services and auto-populate document fields.
- Generates ready-to-print PDF output using a consistent template.
- Stores client and service data locally using **SQLite** for offline-first operation.
- Built as a native desktop app with **Tauri + Rust**, keeping the binary lightweight.

rhythmic.description: An application that helps you manage music playlists across YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud in one place.
content: # Overview
Rhythmic lets you consolidate and control music playlists from multiple platforms without switching between apps.
## Features
- Integrated **three OAuth providers** (Google, Spotify, SoundCloud) for unified authentication.
- Playlist CRUD operations synced across services via a **.NET** backend.
- Frontend built in **React + TypeScript** with a responsive, minimal UI.
- **MySQL** schema designed to handle cross-platform playlist and track metadata.

blaze-website.description: The official website for Blaze.lt, showcasing the company's services and portfolio.
content: # Overview
A modern, user-friendly marketing site built for Blaze.lt to present their services, past work, and contact details.
## Stack
- Built with **Svelte** and **Tailwind CSS** for fast, maintainable frontend code.
- Dynamic content driven by a **MySQL** backend.
- Fully responsive and optimised for SEO and accessibility.

shorty.description: A lightweight URL shortening service built with Go and SQL.
content: # Overview
Shorty is a no-frills URL shortener that creates compact links for long URLs, making them easier to share.
## Features
- Create and resolve shortened URLs with low-latency **Go** HTTP handlers.
- Persistent storage backed by SQL with an indexed redirect table.
- Minimal dependency footprint — no frameworks, just the standard library.

timitis.description: A full-cycle IT service order management platform bridging client requests and service delivery.
content: # Overview
Built during an internship at Timitis, this platform manages the full lifecycle of IT service orders from submission to resolution.
## Architecture
- **React + TypeScript** frontend with a component-driven, type-safe UI.
- **Spring Boot (Java)** backend exposing secure RESTful APIs.
- Relational database schema designed for high-volume service request querying.
## Process
- Operated in an **Agile** environment with daily stand-ups and sprint planning.
- Version-controlled with Git across a multi-developer team.

worsetagram.description: An Android clone of Instagram — deliberately worse, but functional.
content: # Overview
A tongue-in-cheek Android app that replicates Instagram's core features in a deliberately rough way.
## Features
- Photo upload, user following, and a feed — all working, none polished.
- **.NET** backend handling auth and media storage.
- Local data persistence via **SQLite**.

purrislav.description: A Discord bot that sends birthday reminders to a specified channel.
content: # Overview
Purrislav tracks birthdays entered by server members and sends a notification to a configured channel on the day.
## Features
- Users register birthdays via slash commands.
- Daily cron-style check fires notifications at midnight in the server's timezone.
- Written in **Rust** for low resource usage — runs on a cheap VPS indefinitely.
- Stores all data in **SQLite** with no external dependencies.

blackjack.description: A browser-based Blackjack game built with JavaScript and HTML using Glassmorphism styling.
content: # Overview
A classic Blackjack implementation playable in the browser, styled with a Glassmorphism aesthetic.
## Features
- Full game loop: deal, hit, stand, bust, and win detection.
- Virtual dealer with basic AI behaviour.
- Pure **JavaScript + HTML/CSS** — zero dependencies.

sortvisualizer.description: A real-time visualiser for sorting algorithms, built with ASP .NET and C#.
content: # Overview
SortVisualizer renders sorting algorithms step-by-step so you can watch them work in real time.
## Supported Algorithms
- Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, Insertion Sort
- Merge Sort, Quick Sort
## Features
- Adjustable array size and animation speed.
- Step counter and comparison tracker shown live.
- Built on **ASP .NET** with a lightweight **C#** backend serving the visualiser state.
